title: Chaos Demon takes half dealt damage if target survives

card.rawText: During your turn, this card may add +3 Atk Dice Rolls for this battle. If this effect is used and it fails to kill the targeted creature, this creature receives 1/2 the damage it dealt.

effect.value: During your turn, this card may add +3 Atk Dice Rolls for this battle. If this effect is used and it fails to kill the targeted creature, this creature receives 1/2 the damage it dealt.
